name: pdf-knowledge-assistant
description: A self-contained AI knowledge platform for Visual Studio Code with local retrieval, grounded answers, evidence-backed document generation, Mermaid diagrams, and interactive knowledge exploration.

commands.title: Test Local Knowledge and Azure OpenAI

chatParticipants.name: pdf-knowledge
chatParticipants.description: Ask evidence-grounded questions across the ingested PDF knowledge base.

commands.name: ask
commands.description: Ask a grounded question using adaptive retrieval

commands.name: deep
commands.description: Use deep retrieval for a detailed evidence-grounded answer

commands.name: fast
commands.description: Use fast retrieval for a concise evidence-grounded answer

commands.name: sources
commands.description: Show ranked evidence without generating an answer

commands.name: document
commands.description: Open Document Builder with this prompt

commands.name: explore
commands.description: Open an interactive evidence-grounded concept map and guided learning path

commands.name: health
commands.description: Test bundled local knowledge and Azure OpenAI

disambiguation.description: Questions that should be answered from the bundled or locally generated PDF knowledge base, including framework definitions, processes, controls, profiles, guidance, and source evidence.
examples: What are the six NIST Cybersecurity Framework functions?
How should an organization create and use an Organizational Profile?
Show the source evidence for CSF Tiers.

pdfKnowledge.azure.endpoint.description: Azure OpenAI resource endpoint. Run 'PDF Knowledge: Configure Azure OpenAI' to set it.

pdfKnowledge.azure.deployment.description: Azure OpenAI deployment name. Run 'PDF Knowledge: Configure Azure OpenAI' to set it.

pdfKnowledge.azure.temperature.description: Default temperature for planning and grounded generation.

pdfKnowledge.azure.maxTokens.description: Default maximum output tokens. Lower values reduce Azure TPM rate-limit pressure.

pdfKnowledge.azure.timeoutMs.description: Azure OpenAI request timeout in milliseconds.

pdfKnowledge.retrieval.defaultMode.description: Default mode for the bundled local TypeScript retrieval engine.

pdfKnowledge.retrieval.maxCompoundQuerie.description: Maximum retrieval queries generated for a compound user question.

pdfKnowledge.document.maxSections.description: Maximum sections generated in one Document Builder run.

pdfKnowledge.document.outputFolder.description: Default workspace-relative output folder for generated Markdown documents.

pdfKnowledge.logging.showPlan.description: Show the Azure query plan in the chat response for debugging.
